heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 341(a)75 Stat. 318Aug. 8, 1961
label: 1148a–1 to 1148a–3 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 341(a)75 Stat. 318Aug. 8, 1961
notes: Section 1148a–1, acts , ; , , provided for transfer of functions of Regional Agricultural Credit Corporation, Washington, D.C., to Secretary of Agriculture to make disaster loans, abolished such corporation, provided for transfer of assets, funds, rights, liabilities, use of revolving, transfer of personnel and delegation of authority by Secretary of Agriculture.Apr. 6, 1949, ch. 49, § 163 Stat. 43Aug. 5, 1950, ch. 592, § 1(a)64 Stat. 414

Section 1148a–2, acts , ; , ; , §§ 1, 2, ; , ; , , ; , , , authorized the Secretary of Agriculture to make loans to farmers and stockmen, prescribed the rates of interest and terms and conditions of the loans, provided for economic disaster loans and rates of interest and terms thereof, special livestock loans, the effective period of such loans, security, rate of interest, terms and conditions of such loans and local loan committees, emergency assistance in furnishing feed and seed, utilization of Agriculture Department agencies, utilization of revolving fund and transfer of funds into the revolving fund.Apr. 6, 1949, ch. 49, § 263 Stat. 44July 14, 1953, ch. 192, § 167 Stat. 149July 7, 1955, ch. 27869 Stat. 263July 15, 1955, ch. 37369 Stat. 366Pub. L. 85–51672 Stat. 357Pub. L. 87–10675 Stat. 220July 11, 1958July 26, 1961

Section 1148a–3, , , provided that no suit or other judicial proceeding instituted by or against the Regional Agricultural Credit Corporation shall abate by reason of sections 1148a–1 and 1148a–2 of this title and permitted substitution of the Secretary as a party in place of the Corporation within six months after .act Apr. 6, 1949, ch. 49, § 3(a)63 Stat. 44Apr. 16, 1949
For subject matter of former sections 1148a–1 to 1148a–3 of this title see section 1921 et seq. of Title 7, Agriculture.

Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective one hundred and twenty days after , or such earlier date as the provisions of chapter 50 of Title 7, Agriculture, are made effective by regulations of Secretary of Agriculture, except that repeal of shall not be effective prior to , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 8, 1961Jan. 1, 1962section 1148a–2(c) of this titlesection 341(a) of Pub. L. 87–128section 1921 of Title 7Repeal effective , by former section 300.1 of Title 6, Code of Federal Regulations, see Effective Date note set out under .Oct. 15, 1961section 1921 of Title 7

Credit Emergency Loans: Termination Date, , as amended by acts , ; , ; , , which authorized the Secretary of Agriculture to make emergency loans for any agricultural purpose until , described persons eligible for such loans and provided for utilization of a revolving fund of the Farm Credit Administration for loans and administrative expenses and additions to such fund from liquidation of loans, was repealed effective one hundred and twenty days after , or such earlier date as the provisions of chapter 50 of Title 7, Agriculture, are made effective by regulations of Secretary of Agriculture by provisions of , set out as a note under .
